name: DAT
description: Interface parity optionally extends the error detection provided on the DAT channel by the DataCheck field.

name: DERR
description: enumerate and convert, as necessary, the Poison and DataCheck error responses to a DERR in the DAT packet.

name: DataCheck
description: Interface parity optionally extends the error detection provided on the DAT channel by the DataCheck field.

name: NDERR
description: In a Data packet that has the RespErr field value set to DERR or NDERR, the value of the Poison and DataCheck

name: RespErr
description: a requirement that the Sender sets the RespErr field value to DERR.
